content:
MODULE: cosmos.integration.vision.reconstruction
FILE: cosmos/integration/vision/reconstruction.py (106 lines)
CATEGORY: integration

DESCRIPTION: cosmos 3D Scene Reconstruction - Structure from Motion (SfM) Core.

"I can see the depth, and the depth sees me!"

This module implements:
1. Feature Matching across keyframes (multi-view geometry).
2. Fundamental Matrix estimation.
3. Sparse Point Cloud generation (simulated or via OpenCV Triangula

CLASSES:
- Point3D
- ReconstructedScene
- ReconstructionEngine
  Methods: def process_frames(self, frames: List[Image.Image]) -> ReconstructedScene

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def create_reconstruction_engine()
